name: Zul'jin
description: A Physical Damage Assassin that gains power while losing Health.
title: Warlord of the Amani
info: Before the elves and their Alliance, the forests of Lordaeron belonged to the trolls of the Amani empire. As their warlord, Zul'jin has united the tribes into an army that stands ready to take back what is theirs and to slay the elves who stole it from them.

Zuljin.name: Grievous Throw
Zuljin.description: Zul'jin throws an axe forward, dealing 125 (+4% per level) damage to the first 2 enemies hit and marking them for 6 seconds. Marked enemies take 50% bonus damage from Zul'jin's next 3 Basic Attacks against them.

Zuljin.name: Twin Cleave
Zuljin.description: Throw 2 axes in a large, circular arc, dealing 112 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing affected enemies by 15% per axe for 2 seconds.

Zuljin.name: Regeneration
Zuljin.description: Zul'jin channels to regenerate 30% of his maximum Health over 4 seconds. Moving while channeling or taking damage will interrupt this effect.

Zuljin.name: Taz'dingo!
Zuljin.description: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!

Zuljin.name: Guillotine
Zuljin.description: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.

Zuljin.name: Berserker
Zuljin.description: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage by 25% but consume 2% maximum Health per attack.  Passive: Zul'jin attacks 1% faster for every 1% of maximum Health missing.  You Want Axe?  Quest: Every 5 Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increases Basic Attack damage by 1.  Reward: After attacking Heroes 75 times, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.  Reward: After attacking Heroes 150 times, Twin Cleave now revolves twice.  Lose 3 stacks on death.

Zuljin.name: Amani Rage
Zuljin.description: Activate to cause Zul'jin to instantly lose 50% of his current Health and heal for that amount over 10 seconds.

1.name: Boneslicer
1.description: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.

1.name: Recklessness
1.description: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 10% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.

1.name: Headhunter
1.description: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2.5%.  Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.

4.name: Troll's Blood
4.description: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.

4.name: Voodoo Shuffle
4.description: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.  Passive: Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.

4.name: Amani Hide
4.description: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.

7.name: Vicious Assault
7.description: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.

7.name: Arcanite Axes
7.description: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by 0.75 every time it hits a Hero.

7.name: Ferocity
7.description: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by 40%.

10.name: Taz'dingo!
10.description: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!

10.name: Guillotine
10.description: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.

13.name: Lacerate
13.description: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by 10% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Eye of Zul'jin
13.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%.

13.name: Ensnare
13.description: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for 1.5 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to 10 seconds.

16.name: No Mercy!
16.description: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage.

16.name: Wrong Place Wrong Time
16.description: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage and count as 5 Hero hits for You Want Axe?.

16.name: Let the Killing Begin
16.description: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by 5%, up to 40%, for 12 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.  Hero Takedowns instantly grant 40% Attack Speed.

20.name: Amani Resilience
20.description: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by 1 second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for 50% of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.

20.name: Buzzsaw
20.description: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing 75% damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.

20.name: Forest Medicine
20.description: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.

20.name: A Surprise For Ya
20.description: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for 50% damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.

tooltipMarkup.Zul'jinAmaniRageAmaniHide: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,Zul'jinAmaniRageAmaniHide,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds and gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinAmaniRageArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor while regenerating Health from it.
tooltipMarkup.Zul'jinPassiveASurpriseForYa: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,ZuljinASurpriseForYaWeaponDamage,Amount/Effect,ZuljinWeaponDamage,Amount)"/>%</c> damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinAmaniRageTalent: Activate to cause Zul'jin to instantly lose <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of his current Health and heal for that amount over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinAmaniRageHealBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinAmaniResilience: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZuljinAmaniResilience,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinArcaniteAxes: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by every time it hits a Hero.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinBerserker: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage by % but consume % maximum Health per attack.Passive: Zul'jin attacks % faster for every % of maximum Health missing.You Want Axe?Quest: Every Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increases Basic Attack damage by .Reward: After attacking Heroes times, Basic Attack range is increased by .Reward: After attacking Heroes times, Twin Cleave now revolves twice.Lose stacks on death.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinBoneslicer: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinGrievousThrowBoneslicerCreateManaHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinBuzzsaw: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="1+Effect,ZuljinGuillotineBuzzsawDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Buzzsaw].Modifier*100"/>%</c> damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinEnsnare: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinEnsnareRoot,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinEnsnareMissModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinEyeOfZuljin: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,ZuljinEyeOfZuljinAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinEyeOfZuljin,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,ZuljinEyeOfZuljin,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Accumulator,ZuljinEyeOfZuljinAccumulator,MaxAccumulation)"player ="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinFerocity: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,ZuljinBerserkerFerocityHealthToAttackSpeed,Ratio*100-100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinForestMedicine: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinGrievousThrow: Zul'jin throws an axe forward, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinGrievousThrowDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> enemies hit and marking them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinGrievousThrowAttackStacks,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Marked enemies take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[GrievousThrowDebuffCheck].Modifier*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> bonus damage from Zul'jin's next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinGrievousThrowApplyAttackStackBehavior,Count" player="0" precision="2"/></c> Basic Attacks against them.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinGuillotine: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinGuillotineBaseDamage,Amount"/></c> damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinHeadhunter: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by %.Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by .
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinLacerate: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,ZuljinTwinCleaveLacerateFirstHitSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor-Behavior,ZuljinTwinCleaveFirstHitSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)*(-100)" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> and its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinTwinCleaveLacerateFirstHitSlow,Duration-Behavior,ZuljinTwinCleaveFirstHitSlow,Duration,"player="0"precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinLetTheKillingBegin: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinLetTheKillingBeginStack,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c>, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinLetTheKillingBeginStack,MaxStackCount*Behavior,ZuljinLetTheKillingBeginStack,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c>, for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinLetTheKillingBeginStack,Duration"/></c> seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.<n/><n/>Hero Takedowns instantly grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinLetTheKillingBeginStack,MaxStackCount*Behavior,ZuljinLetTheKillingBeginStack,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Attack Speed.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinNoMercyTalent: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ZuljinHeroWeaponNoMercyTalentPercentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of maximum Health as damage.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinRecklessness: While Zul'jin is below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health, he gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ZuljinRecklessnessBelow75Health,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> Spell Power. While he is below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ZuljinRecklessnessBelow50Health,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinRegeneration: Zul'jin channels to regenerate <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinRegenerationCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*(Behavior,ZuljinRegeneration,Duration+1)*100" player="0"/>%</c> of his maximum Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinRegeneration,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Moving while channeling or taking damage will interrupt this effect.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinTazdingo: For the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinTazdingoUnkillable,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Health. Taz'dingo!
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinTrollsBlood: Increase Regeneration's healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(100*Talent,ZuljinTrollsBlood,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)-100"/>%</c>. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ZuljinRegenerationTrollsBloodCreateManaHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinTwinCleave: Throw <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinTwinCleaveCreateLeftUnit,SpawnCount+Effect,ZuljinTwinCleaveCreateRightUnit,SpawnCount" player="0"/></c> axes in a large, circular arc, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinTwinCleaveRightDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slowing affected enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinTwinCleaveFirstHitSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> per axe for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZuljinTwinCleaveFirstHitSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinViciousAssault: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZuljinViciousAssault,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds and its damage bonus by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,ZuljinViciousAssault,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinVoodooShuffle: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(1-Talent,ZuljinVoodooShuffle,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)" precision="2"player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZuljinWrongPlaceWrongTime: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinTwinCleaveWrongPlaceWrongTimeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and count as <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZuljinTwinCleaveWrongPlaceWrongTimeModifyToken,Value*5"/></c> Hero hits for You Want Axe?.
